allow: PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\rattana-push"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; git clone https://github.com/suratpoom/rattana.git $tmp 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)
